basics.name: Vinayak Gupta
basics.summary: Software Engineer building tools, platforms, and high-performance web applications with a focus on ownership and clarity.

highlights: Built a real-time event-sourced transaction engine using Node.js and Postgres, cutting latency by 90% and enabling instant ledger updates.
Replaced an aging polling system with a real-time event-sourced architecture to handle increased throughput.
Audited the architecture of a Next.js App Router migration stuck on complex caching issues.
Fixed the cache invalidation strategy and shipped the migration 2 weeks ahead of schedule.
Integrated an automated code-review agent into the Azure DevOps ecosystem using service hooks and PowerShell.
Unblocked developers by reducing manual review feedback loop times.
